title: SQL: Floating point exception
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (bla1 INTEGER, bla2 INTEGER, bla3 REAL, bla4 TEXT);
SELECT CASE WHEN (bla1 - bla2) > 0 THEN 1.0/(bla1 - bla2) ELSE NULL END FROM test;
SELECT CASE WHEN bla3 IS NULL THEN 'No value' ELSE CAST(bla3 AS TEXT) END FROM test;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL case statement
